name: Babeun Mokko Daninya: K-Cooking Diary
overview: Special Chefs Gather to Spread the Charm of Korean Cuisine Worldwide! THE BOYZ HYUNJAE & Q's Special Korean Recipe Book Project. Amidst fun and tension, a variety of Korean dishes are created in an exciting cooking battle… They will explore not only various Korean dishes but also Hungarian cuisine during this special time in 〈BABEUN MOKKO DANINYA〉
